title: Define group color during group create
excerpt:
Hi team, 
When creating groups through the API I don’s see a possibility to define the group color. Am I overlooking something or do I try to stretch the API too much :slight_smile:

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi team,

When creating groups through the API I don’s see a possibility to define the group color. Am I overlooking something or do I try to stretch the API too much

posts.author: Scott-monday.com (Scott Underwood)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @basdebruin!

Our API doesn’t not currently allow you to set or update the group color. This is something that would need to be done within the monday.com UI as of now
